data.title: Not total victory, but a new reality: How Israel reshaped its war with Iran | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: NATIONAL AFFAIRS: Israel did not achieve all its war aims against Iran, but it emerged more secure, with its fiercest enemy badly weakened and the regional balance shifting in its favor.
data.keywords: Iran,Lebanon,iran israel war,Israel Iran War,Operation Epic Fury,Operation Roaring Lion
